'''lak챦fj챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamorato|enamorato]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamorato|enamorato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| lak챦fj챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fth|lak챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fj|lak챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fsh|lak챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f|lak챦fj챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:lak챦fk챦fj챦fth|lak챦fk챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:lak챦fk챦fj챦fj|lak챦fk챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:lak챦fk챦fj챦fsh|lak챦fk챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:lak챦fk챦fj챦f|lak챦fk챦fj챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fth|lak챦fj챦fth]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fj|lak챦fj챦fj]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦fsh|lak챦fj챦fsh]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f|lak챦fj챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fl|lak챦fj챦f챦fl]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fl|lak챦fj챦f챦fl]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fl|lak챦fj챦f챦fl]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fl|lak챦fj챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f|lak챦fj챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fn|lak챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fn|lak챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fn|lak챦fj챦f챦fn]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦fn|lak챦fj챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦foro|lak챦fj챦f챦foro]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦foro|lak챦fj챦f챦foro]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦foro|lak챦fj챦f챦foro]] || [[word:lak챦fj챦f챦foro|lak챦fj챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|3bdbb33}}
